allow: PowerShell(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name='node.exe'" | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -match 'portfolio' } | Select-Object ProcessId, CommandLine | Format-List)

PowerShell($c = Get-Content node_modules\\next\\dist\\compiled\\@next\\font\\dist\\google\\font-data.json -Raw; @\('Instrument Sans','IBM Plex Mono'\) | ForEach-Object { "$_ -> $\($c.Contains\('"' + $_ + '"'\)\)" })
